videoSnippet.title: A Game Worthy Of World Champions || Magnus vs Gukesh || Norway Chess 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator 
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Carlsen, Magnus (2840) - Gukesh D (2732)
Norway Chess 2026 (Chess.com) [19] 2026.06.05
B10 Caro-Kann, anti-anti-Caro-Kann defence

1.e4 c6 2.c4 d5 3.exd5 cxd5 4.cxd5 Nf6 5.Nc3 Nxd5 6.Nf3 Nc6 7.Bb5 e6 8.O-O Be7 9.d4 O-O 10.Re1 Bd7 11.Bd3 Rc8 12.Nxd5 exd5 13.Ne5 Bf6 14.Bf4 g6 15.Qb3 Na5 16.Qb4 Be6 17.Rad1 Re8 18.h3 Be7 19.Qa4 Qb6 20.Nd7 Bxd7 21.Qxd7 Nc6 22.Qxd5 Red8 23.Qb5 Bf6 24.Qxb6 axb6 25.Be4 Rxd4 26.Rxd4 Nxd4 27.Bxb7 Rc2 28.Bh6 Ne6 29.Rc1 Rxc1+ 30.Bxc1 Nc5 31.Bd5 Na4 32.Kf1 Nxb2 33.Ke2 Kf8 34.Be3 Ke7 35.Kd2 Na4 36.Kd3 Be5 37.Bb3 Nc5+ 38.Kc4 f5 39.Kb5 f4 40.Bd2 Kd7 41.Kxb6 Ne4 42.Bc1 Nxf2 43.Bd5 Bd4+ 44.Kb5 g5 45.Kc4 Bb6 46.Bf3 Nh1 47.Bd2 Ng3 48.a4 Kc7 49.a5 Bf2 50.Kd5 h5 51.Bc3 Kb7 52.Bf6 g4 53.hxg4 hxg4 54.Bxg4 Nf1 55.a6+ Ka7 56.Be2 Nd2 57.Bd4+ Bxd4 58.Kxd4 f3 59.Bxf3 Kxa6 60.Bd5 Kb6 61.g4 Nf1 62.g5 Ng3 63.Ke5 Kc7 64.g6 Nh5 65.Bf3
